summary: Dick Advocaat's side counter-attack with pace up top, built around the Bacuna brothers — but the rest-defence is open.
style: 4-4-3 / 4-2-3-1 — counter-attacking with pace up top, combinations with wingers & fullbacks; sit behind the ball but keep the CF high.
strengths: Counter-attacking pace with the CF held high as an outlet
Wide combinations with the Bacuna brothers central

keyPlayers.name: Juninho Bacuna
keyPlayers.note: Creative midfielder (23 chances created in qualifying), drives well with the ball (67% dribbling), 5 goal involvements — the difference-maker in tight games vs Ecuador & Ivory Coast

tactics: Sit behind the ball, keep the striker high, and break with pace through the Bacuna brothers. The open rest-defence is the obvious risk.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
